name: akbun-presentation
description: akbun presentation formats — external light-sandwich decks and dark step-slide study decks with consistent voice, layout, and diagram language (pptx/Google Slides)

interface.shortDescription: akbun presentation decks — external light-sandwich or dark step-slide study format (pptx / Google Slides)
interface.longDescription: Turns any topic, post, code, or incident story into a presentation deck in akbun's style, with two modes. External mode (default, for meetups/seminars): dark cover and section slides with a yellow accent bar sandwich white content slides carrying numbered section headers, square-bullet hierarchies, thin black-line diagrams with pale-yellow workload and pale-green resource fills, VS Code-style dark code panels, github/demo footers, and page numbers. Study mode: all-dark charcoal slides, Gmarket Sans, one message per slide, unfilled white-outline diagrams. Both share a question-driven story flow with yellow point and red problem accents. Outputs a pptx file that can also be imported into Google Slides.
defaultPrompt: 이 주제로 밋업에서 발표할 akbun 스타일 외부 발표자료(pptx) 만들어줘
Make an akbun-style dark step-slide study deck (pptx) about this topic
이 블로그 글을 akbun 발표 스타일 슬라이드로 만들어줘
이 장애 경험을 질문-여정-답 구조의 발표 덱으로 만들어줘
